rationale: This statute governs additional state aid for OER instructional materials printing/shipping. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13, so the proposed change does not affect it.
quote: Subject to Section 31.0751, a school district is entitled to additional state aid for each school year in an amount not to exceed $20 for each student for the costs incurred or for which the district is obligated to pay during the school year in which the aid is provided for the printing and shipping of open education resource instructional material made available under Subchapter B-1, Chapter 31.
_note: No conflict identified. Educ. Code §48.308 is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraised value.
